name: agentic-studio
description: Autonomous in-session SDLC orchestrator: a prompt becomes tested, working software via a parallel agent swarm on a global dependency-graph scheduler — with design-system routing, TDD, two-stage code review, and a live dark/light dashboard (locked plan flowchart, interactive approvals, per-gate test progress, milestone undo/redo). Runs under Claude Code with no API key.
